description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted adult human figure, with elongated limbs and body parts stretched unnaturally in various directions. The head is visible and appears to be attached to a body that is warped, with the torso and arms extended in a surreal, almost rubber-like fashion. The figure is dressed in casual attire, including a short-sleeve shirt and long pants, with shoes on the feet. The proportions are exaggerated, with the arms and legs appearing much longer and thinner than normal, and the body twisted in a way that defies typical human anatomy. The surface texture appears smooth, with visible folds and creases in the clothing, but the overall form is highly unrealistic. The object does not appear to be carrying any accessories or objects.
description: A highly distorted adult human figure in casual clothing, with elongated limbs and a twisted, stretched body. The surface is smooth and the figure is not carrying any objects.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso are visible, with the right arm and shoulder stretched dramatically upward and outward.
description_view_1: The left side of the body is shown, with the arm and torso elongated horizontally, and the legs appearing thin and extended.
description_view_2: The lower body and legs are most prominent, with the legs stretched apart and the torso twisted, showing the unnatural proportions.
description_view_3: The back and side of the figure are visible, highlighting the extreme elongation of the arms and the twisted posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and long pants
